ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the genetic sample */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual from whom the sample was taken */,
  "biosample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the biosample */,
  "population_code" TEXT /* Code representing the population the sample belongs to */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "superpopulation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the superpopulation the sample belongs to */,
  "superpopulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the superpopulation */,
  "population_elastic_id" TEXT /* Elasticsearch identifier for the population */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "consent_form_id" TEXT /* ID of the consent form */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., given, pending, withdrawn) */,
  "genetic_disorder" TEXT /* Information about any genetic disorders (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the sample record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_biosample_id FOREIGN KEY ("biosample_id") REFERENCES biosamples ("biosample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_superpopulation_code FOREIGN KEY ("superpopulation_code") REFERENCES superpopulations ("superpopulation_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_population_code FOREIGN KEY ("population_code") REFERENCES populations ("population_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "biosamples" (
  "biosample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each biosample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the biosample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the biosample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the biosample is stored */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the biosample was collected */,
  "collector_id" TEXT /* ID of the collector */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the biosample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the biosample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the biosample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the biosample record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_code" TEXT /* Code representing the population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "superpopulation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the superpopulation the population belongs to */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the population is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the population record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the population record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "superpopulations" (
  "superpopulation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the superpopulation */,
  "superpopulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the superpopulation */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the superpopulation is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the superpopulation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the superpopulation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("superpopulation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection project */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the data collection record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_collections" (
  "sample_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample-collection relationship */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic sample */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection project */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was contributed to the collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the sample-collection relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample-collection relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the sample-collection relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collections_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, VCF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the data file record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
